Name: Columbia X Graco PowerFill 3.5 Loading Pump
Short description: Note: This product is not eligible for rebates, wholesale pricing, or discounts and is only available in North America.
Description:
Note: This product is not eligible for rebates, wholesale pricing, or discounts and is only available in North America.

Columbia Tools has partnered with Graco to bring you a Columbia Tools branded version of their already successful cordless powered loading pump for Columbia customers. The Columbia X Graco PowerFill is designed to fill all automatic taping and finishing tools with ease. The PowerFill system completely eliminates the need for manual pumping, allowing you to fill with just the push of a button.

Say Goodbye to Hand Pumping. The single-button pumping mechanism reduces fatigue and minimizes the risk of injury associated with manual pumps. With a flow rate of up to 3.5 gpm, you can fill tools lightning-fast, and with the capability to pump up to 55 gallons on a single battery charge, you’ll have all-day performance. Plus, it’s programmable to automatically refill tools with Precision Fill.

Bucket not included.

Features

  • SmartControl Pro with Programmable Precision Fill: Automatically refills your tools to your preset level.
  • One Button Pumping: Eliminates fatigue and potential injuries.
  • Hands-Free Continuous Run Mode: Ideal for transferring large quantities of material or self-cleaning.
  • Hi-Rise Fill Tube: Allows you to fill tools while standing upright, protecting your back and reducing fatigue. The tube rotates to position the outlet where needed, including above buckets to save space and contain drips.
  • Includes Filler Attachments: Designed for angle and flat boxes.

Powerstroke Pump

  • 4X Life vs. Manual Pumps: Built for exceptional durability.
  • Fastest Tool Fills: Pumps up to 3.5 gpm for efficient filling.
  • Maintenance Free: Tool-less access for easy cleaning of the pump cylinder, inlet, and filter.

ProConnect Pump and Removable Powerhead

  • No-Tools Pump and Powerhead Removal: Easily detach the powerhead for storage and quick cleaning.

Powered by DEWALT®

  • Compatible with any 20V MAX Lithium-Ion DEWALT Battery: Pumps up to 55 gallons per charge for reliable all-day use.

Adjustable Bucket Stabilizer

  • No-Tools Adjustment: Fits most buckets and containers.
  • Oversized Foot Bracket and Stabilizer Arm: Keeps the pump secure and stable.
  • Convertible Outlet: Change from right to left-sided pump outlet in minutes

Specifications

  • Version: 26B418
  • Max GPM (lpm): 3.5 (13.2)
  • Weight Lbs (Kg): 17 (7.7)
  • Pump: PowerStroke
  • Power/Battery: (1) DEWALT 20V MAX* COMPACT 2.0 ah Lithium-Ion Batteries and (1) Charger
  • Pump Outlet: Hi-Rise Fill Tube w/Box Filler
  • Precision Fill: Yes
  • Inlet Filter: Tool-less, 10 Mesh (1)
  • Adjustable Flow: Yes
  • Fits Container: Adjustable up to 5 (7-15" Bucket Height Range)

Individual Part Numbers:

CPFP – Columbia PowerFill Pump (comes with box filler)

Description:
Fat Boy Smoothing Blades

Available Now

Columbia is proud to launch the Fat Boy Smoothing Blades—built for comfort, precision, and performance.

With a lightweight, rubberized ergonomic grip to reduce slipping, the Fat Boy delivers smooth, even finishes with control. Its replaceable stainless steel blade offers long-term durability, while the new Fat Boy Smoothing Blade Claw expands your finishing options.

Two new Fiberglass Telescopic Extension Poles debut alongside the blades. Their snap lock system connects seamlessly with the Fat Boy Adapter and also works with our 2K Handle Mud Rollers, giving unmatched versatility.

When used by Hand or handles—the Fat Boy brings efficiency and comfort to every pass.

Key Features:

  • Replaceable Stainless Blade: Long-lasting and ultra-durable.

    Lightweight & Ergonomic Grip: Designed for comfort, control, and less fatigue.

    Rounded Anti-Trace Edges: Minimize lines and imperfections.

    New Fiberglass Telescopic Poles with Snap Lock: Extend your reach and work seamlessly with Fat Boy Blades and 2K Handle Mud Rollers.

    Available Sizes & Part #:

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 7” – FSB7

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 12” – FSB12

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 14” – FSB14

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 18” – FSB18

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 32” – FSB32

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 48” – FSB48

    FSBC – Fat Boy Smoothing Blade Claw

Description:
Order now to be ready for the Launch on December 15, 2024!

Introducing the Columbia Mud Pan—the first in our new line of premium hand tools, designed for professionals who demand durability, comfort, and performance. Crafted from heavy-gauge stainless steel, this mud pan is built to withstand the toughest tasks, while its watertight, laser-welded seams ensure long-lasting reliability. With tapered ends and sides for a secure grip, this tool is ready to handle any job with ease. Plus, every Columbia Mud Pan comes with a free soft, non-slip rubber grip for enhanced comfort and ease of use.

Now available in three convenient sizes—12", 14", and 16"—there’s a Columbia Mud Pan perfect for any project. The mud pans are sold in packs of 6 to dealers, but you have the flexibility to sell them individually to your customers.

Lifetime Warranty:

We stand by the quality and craftsmanship of our products. Each Columbia Mud Pan is backed by a lifetime warranty, ensuring you can rely on it for years of hard work.

Key Features:

  • Heavy-Gauge Stainless Steel: Engineered for strength and longevity, this mud pan resists wear and tear for reliable, long-term use.
  • Watertight Laser-Welded Seams: Prevents leaks, even under heavy-duty conditions, for consistent performance.
  • Comfortable Grip: Tapered ends and sides provide a secure, ergonomic hold for better control and comfort.
  • Straight Edges: Ideal for wiping joint knives clean, ensuring a mess-free and efficient work process.
  • Complimentary Rubber Grip: Every Columbia Mud Pan comes with a FREE soft, non-slip rubber grip for enhanced comfort and ease of use—adding even more value to this already premium tool.
  • Available in 12", 14", and 16" Sizes: Choose the right size for your specific needs and project requirements.

Name: Columbia Predator Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper
Short description: The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless.
Description:
The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless. The Columbia Taper is a precision built tool that has been perfected over 38 years, but now it is also significantly lighter than all other tapers on the market and dent proof. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to our easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The Patent Pending Pump Action cutting sleeve gives the operator a smoother glide over teflon bearings, superb grip and the pull ring is great for higher ceilings. The Predator maintains it’s stable temperature and remains warm to the touch. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. The Titanium pull rod is just another detail that adds style and edge to this innovative, unique taper. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you.

FEATURES:

  • Handmade from Carbon Fiber and steel components
  • Titanium pull rod
  • Adjustable Brake
  • Quick release for tape changing
  • Reduced Drag system for corners
  • Stainless steel side plates, creaser arms and cable drum
  • Quick release cap
  • NEW Very smooth Patent Pending Pump Action cutting system with a roller chain
  • 53" in length
  • Machined in our state of the art factory in Canada

Name: Columbia Sawed Off Mini PREDATOR Automatic Taper
Short description: Columbia Taping Tools introduces the world's first Mini Carbon Fiber Taper, The Predator "Sawed Off" Mini.
Description: Columbia Taping Tools introduces the world's first Mini Carbon Fiber Taper, The Predator "Sawed Off" Mini. Unlike other taper bodies made mostly from aluminum, the Predator's Carbon Fiber construction, makes this precision-engineered tool 20% lighter and more durable then any standard mini taper on the market. Another unique benefit of this Dent Proof construction, is that Carbon Fiber maintains temperature stability, meaning this taper will remain warm to the touch. The 6 wheel cutting sleeve has been updated in favor of teflon sliders which gives the operator a smoother glide and better grip. Now, changing the sliders out is simple field maintenance and can be installed with a standard screwdriver in minutes as opposed to half an hour or more. The pull ring is ideal for higher ceilings. The Predator will tape flats and angles effortlessly with less drag in the corners. The quick release cap makes cleaning a breeze and the stainless steel side plates, cable drum, and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. With style, functionality, and durability the Predator from Columbia takes the -Evolution of Taping- to a whole new level. Predator "Sawed Off" Mini is perfect for taping drywall in small rooms and closets when a full size taper is too cumbersome.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia Taping Tools > Automatic Tapers
Tags: Columbia Tools, SPTAPER, drywall taping tool, finishing tool, columbia, STAPER, Sawed, Taper, Automatic Tapers

Name: Sabre Smoothing Blades
Short description: Columbia has answered the call from our customers looking for a lighter/more affordable version of the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. The Sabre Smoothing Blades still offer a precise finish but by no…
Description:
Columbia has answered the call from our customers looking for a lighter/more affordable version of the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. The Sabre Smoothing Blades still offer a precise finish but by no means does this product replace the Tomahawk’s being our premium option. It is our solution to Columbia Customers looking for a lighter/more affordable option. The body profile remains the same as the Tomahawk’s but is made from high quality plastic rather than billet aluminium.

One of the standout features of the Sabre Smoothing Blades is their remarkable weight—around 60% lighter than the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades—making them easier to maneuvre and control. Additionally, they offer a competitive price point costing around 40% less allowing you to choose the right tool for your needs without compromise.

Whether you prefer manual use or want to enhance your reach with a Sabre Extension pole (using the Sabre Claw adapter), the Sabre Smoothing Blades deliver perfectly even usage and smoothness across the entire length of the blade. Their ergonomic and lightweight design ensures that you can work efficiently without fatigue.

FEATURES:

  • 10 sizes: 7", 10", 12", 14", 16", 18", 24", 32", 40" & 48"
  • Works with by hand or with the Sabre Claw Adapter (SBC) adaptor for the Sabre Pole (SBP)
  • Hardened Stainless Steel Blade: Durable and ultra-abrasion resistant for long-lasting performance.
  • Rounded Anti-Trace Edges: Designed to minimise marks and imperfections.
  • High-Performance Bi-Flex Technology: Featuring a PVC plate for enhanced flexibility and control.

Name: Platinum Corner Flusher 2.5" (PT-2.5CF)
Short description: Platinum 2.5" Corner Flusher constructed from surgical-grade stainless spring steel for precise internal corner finishing. Compatible with all major industry handles.
Description:
Platinum Corner Flusher 2.5" (PT-2.5CF) delivers precise, consistent results when finishing internal 90-degree drywall corners. This tool embeds tape and feathers joint compound in a single pass, minimizing the need for manual sanding or extensive touch-up work. Its compact 2.5-inch profile is specifically engineered for tight architectural spaces, including areas around windows and door frames where larger tools cannot maneuver.

Built from surgical-grade stainless spring steel, this flusher resists corrosion and maintains its tension for reliable, long-term performance on demanding job sites. The universal design ensures seamless integration with standard angle head and flusher handles from all major industry manufacturers.

Features:

Description:
The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is the world’s lightest automatic taper. Weighing only 5.65 pounds, the 07TT-C is up to 20% lighter than other tapers on the market. This significant weight reduction helps to decrease worker fatigue, making it easier to handle and use for extended periods. Innovative Carbon Fiber Design The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is constructed from carbon fiber, which makes both the main tube and the control tube incredibly durable. Carbon fiber is a material that won’t dent and remains temperature-neutral. This means no more dealing with cold tubes in winter or hot tubes in summer, providing consistent performance year-round. Advanced Features for Efficiency The 07TT-C comes with TapeTech’s EasyClean® cover plate and tube protector design. This feature simplifies the cleaning process, saving you time and effort. Additionally, the taper includes an adjustable brake, allowing you to control the flow of the joint compound easily. The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is known for having the smoothest action in the industry, ensuring a seamless application every time. Versatile Application The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is designed to apply joint tape and compound simultaneously. It works on both flat joints on walls and ceilings as well as internal corners. This versatility makes it an essential tool for any drywall finishing job, big or small. Benefits of the EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper - Lightweight: At 5.65 pounds, it reduces worker fatigue. - Durable: Made from carbon fiber, it won’t dent and is temperature-neutral. - Easy to Clean: Features TapeTech’s EasyClean® cover plate and tube protector design. - Adjustable Brake: Allows for easy control of joint compound flow. - Smooth Action: Known for the smoothest action in the industry. - Versatile: Applies joint tape and compound to both flat joints and internal corners. Improve Your Work Quality Using the EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper helps improve the quality and efficiency of your drywall finishing work. Its lightweight design and smooth operation allow for precise application, reducing the need for touch-ups and rework. This tool is ideal for professionals who demand the best in performance and reliability. Short description: The TapeTech Corner Roller quickly and accurately embeds the tape firmly into the internal corners of the drywall. Use the corner roller immediately a
Description: The TapeTech Corner Roller quickly and accurately embeds the tape firmly into the internal corners of the drywall. Use the corner roller immediately after applying joint tape to the internal corner with the automatic taper. The corner roller forces excess joint compound out from behind the tape in preparation for the corner finisher. The TapeTech Corner Roller features stainless steel rollers for crisp edges and long life. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle – not included. Embeds tape into compound at inside corners of walls and ceilings Forces excess joint compound out of corner in preparation for corner finisher/flusher to smooth
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Automatic Tapers

Description: The continuous flow tank filter fits into the bottom of the 95 liter filler tank of the CTPMP continuous flow pump. It prevents foreign bodies from getting into the pump so that the excess filler compound can be reused from the peeling phase of the drywall finishing. Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Continuous Flow System

Description: TapeTech Applicator Heads apply a consistent base coat of joint compound for the cleanest and most efficient installation of paper-faced corner bead or joint tape. Short description: The TapeTech Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used
Description: The TapeTech Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. The 40XTT 2" Corner Finisher is often used with the FHTT or XHTT handle as part of the taping process to embed tape into the corners and remove excess joint compound after the 15TTE Corner Roller. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle – not included. Wipes down excess mud in internal corners Embeds inside corner tape on walls and ceilings

TapeTech Corner Finisher The TapeTech Corner Finisher is designed to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. It can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. This tool, also known as an Angle Finisher, attaches to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner®. It helps you quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. Perfect for Internal Corners The TapeTech Corner Finisher is ideal for wiping down excess mud in internal corners. It embeds inside corner tape on walls and ceilings, making the finishing process smooth and efficient. Whether you are working on small residential projects or large commercial sites, this tool ensures a high-quality finish every time. Versatility and Ease of Use Corner Finishers are versatile and can be used in various applications. They are perfect for both wall-to-wall and wall-to-ceiling corners. Name: 3" EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher
Short description: The TapeTech EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner F
Description: The TapeTech EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The “adjustable” feature of this tool refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the corner finisher. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finishers have wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle – not included. Wipes down excess mud in internal corners Finishes inside corners of walls and ceilings
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Corner & Angle Tools

Short description: The TapeTech 76TT EasyClean® Loading Pump combines reliability with innovation. The 76TT features the slim tube design preferred by professional finis
Description: The TapeTech 76TT EasyClean® Loading Pump combines reliability with innovation. The 76TT features the slim tube design preferred by professional finishers and robust construction for dependable performance and long life. The TapeTech 76TT Loading Pump has a redesigned head and a new Twist-lock foot valve that provides secure attachment and easy removal for cleaning and maintenance. And the 76TT does not require a paper gasket for the filler adapter or gooseneck due to an innovative, integrated O-Ring that provides a terrific seal with fewer headaches from lost, worn or damaged paper gaskets. The 76TT pump accepts the standard 85T gooseneck and 90T filler adapter. Fills Automatic Tapers (with 85T gooseneck) Fills finishing boxes, MudRunner®, corner applicators and nail spotters (with 90T filler adapter)
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Automatic Tapers

Description: The 76TT-CA EasyClean® Loading Pump is specifically designed to work with standard joint compound buckets in Canada, which are slightly taller than standard U.S. buckets. Short description: TapeTech 7" Corner Applicator: Streamlined Efficiency for Perfect Corners The TapeTech 7" Corner Applicator is designed to supply joint compound to Co
Description: TapeTech 7" Corner Applicator: Streamlined Efficiency for Perfect Corners The TapeTech 7" Corner Applicator is designed to supply joint compound to Corner Finishers, enabling fast and efficient finishing of internal corners (angles). This versatile drywall corner mud applicator can also be used with Applicator Heads to quickly and cleanly apply joint compound to both internal and external corners, facilitating the installation of paper-faced corner bead. With a stainless steel cone, the TapeTech 7" Corner Applicator ensures durability and reliability on the job. Key Features Stainless Steel Cone: The applicator features a robust stainless steel cone, which ensures longevity and reliable performance, even with frequent use. Versatile Use: The drywall applicator can be used with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle (both handles are not included). This versatility allows you to choose the best handle for your specific needs and preferences. Multiple Applications: The applicator is compatible with various heads to apply joint compound in different scenarios. Use it with the 16TT to apply joint compound to external corners for paper-faced bead application, or with the 16TT90 to apply joint compound to inside corners for tape application. It also finishes internal corners when used with tapetech corner finisher. Usage and Benefits Using the TapeTech 7" Corner Applicator is straightforward. Simply attach it to the appropriate handle and applicator head for your task. The ergonomic design ensures comfortable use, even during extended periods. Professionals will appreciate the ability to finish internal corners quickly and efficiently. When used with TapeTech Corner Finishers, the drywall corner applicator delivers a smooth, even layer of compound, reducing the need for additional sanding and touch-ups. Furthermore, the applicator's compatibility with Applicator Heads allows for seamless application of joint compound to both internal and external corners, making it an invaluable corner drywall tool for installing paper-faced corner bead. This adaptability ensures that you can handle a variety of finishing tasks with ease and precision. User Experience The TapeTech 7" Corner Applicator is designed with the user in mind. Its lightweight construction and ergonomic handle reduce strain, making it easy to use for extended periods. The precise control over the flow of joint compound allows for consistent results, enhancing the overall quality of your work. Additionally, the stainless steel cone ensures that the joint compound applicator remains durable and reliable, even with frequent use. Compatibility and Versatility The Corner Applicator stands out for its compatibility and versatility. It can be used with a range of TapeTech drywall tools, including different handles and applicator heads, making it a flexible tool for various drywall finishing tasks. This adaptability ensures that you can handle different types of corners with a single, reliable tool. Quality and Durability Constructed from high-quality materials, the TapeTech 7" Corner Applicator is built to last. It is designed to withstand the demands of professional use, ensuring reliable performance over time. TapeTech's commitment to quality means that you can trust the corner box drywall to deliver exceptional results on every project. Name: EasyClean® Nail Spotter
Short description: TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is a must-have tool for drywall finishing. It fills the depressions left by nail
Description:
TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is a must-have tool for drywall finishing. It fills the depressions left by nail or screw heads during drywall installation. The Nail Spotter's easy clean box design helps fill these depressions and remove extra compound at the same time. This makes the drywall finishing process faster and easier. Key Features A key feature of the TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is its hardened steel skid plate. This plate lets the Nail Spotter move smoothly along the wall. It also protects the stainless steel blade from damage caused by nail or screw heads that are not fully set below the drywall surface. Consequently, this feature helps the tool last longer, making it a smart buy for drywall professionals. Description: The QuickBox® QSX from TapeTech is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds. The 6 ½” QuickBox® QSX is the perfect tool for contractors who use fast-setting joint compound for the first coat over the paper or fiberglass joint tape. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox® QSX with a few light taps. The glass-filled polypropylene shell provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. The optimized blade design matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. And it takes just a few seconds to change the long-lasting blades. QuickBox® QSX works with all finishing box handles, including the Wizard®. Now you can combine the speed and consistency of finishing boxes with the speed of fast-setting joint compound!

Name: Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper
Short description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper: Revolutionizing Drywall Finishing The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an innovative tool designed to st
Description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper: Revolutionizing Drywall Finishing   The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an innovative tool designed to streamline the drywall finishing process. When connected to the Continuous Flow Pump (CTPMP), this advanced taper simultaneously applies drywall tape and the correct amount of joint compound to all types of drywall joints. This combination of efficiency and precision makes it an indispensable tool for professional contractors. Key Features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper   One of the standout features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is its inline handle with dual trigger, which enhances control and ease of use. Weighing just 7 pounds, it is lightweight enough to be maneuvered effortlessly, reducing user fatigue during extended use. The taper's design includes a creaser wheel, which ensures a perfect finish every time by embedding the tape securely into the joint compound.   Additionally, the tool-less hose connection makes setup and disassembly quick and straightforward, saving valuable time on the job. For added convenience, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper can be paired with the CTVLV for wireless, radio frequency (RF) control, allowing the user to manage the flow of joint compound from the pump to the taper with ease.   Versatile Application   The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is versatile, capable of handling various types of drywall joints with precision: - Butt Joints and Flat Joints: Whether you're working on walls or ceilings, the taper applies the joint compound and tape seamlessly, ensuring a smooth and professional finish. - Internal Corners: The taper is designed to efficiently handle internal corners on walls and ceilings, making it a comprehensive solution for all your drywall finishing needs. Advantages of Using the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper   - Increased Efficiency: By applying both tape and joint compound simultaneously, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper significantly speeds up the drywall finishing process. This increased efficiency allows for more work to be completed in less time, enhancing productivity. - Consistent Quality: The precise application of joint compound and tape ensures a consistent, high-quality finish on every joint. This consistency reduces the need for additional touch-ups and sanding, saving both time and materials. - Ease of Use: The lightweight design and ergonomic inline handle make the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper easy to maneuver, even in tight spaces. The dual trigger system provides greater control over the application process, resulting in a more accurate and professional finish. - Quick Setup: The tool-less hose connection and wireless RF control simplify the setup and operation of the taper, allowing users to focus on the task at hand without worrying about complex equipment adjustments.   Conclusion   The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an essential tool for anyone involved in drywall installation and finishing. Its advanced features, combined with its lightweight and ergonomic design, make it a valuable addition to any toolkit. Whether you are working on large-scale projects or smaller tasks, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper will help you achieve a flawless finish with minimal effort. Embrace the future of drywall finishing with the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper and experience unparalleled efficiency and quality in your work.

Name: Extension Handle
Short description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use
Description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model FHTT. The base handle for the extension handle system is model XHTT. The base handle fits the corner roller, corner applicator and nail spotter without any adapters. The heavy duty, easy-to-change adapter (CFA-TT) connect the handles to the corner finishers. And the optimal diameter makes TapeTech handles the most ergonomic in the industry. Both base handles feature a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Automatic Tapers

Name: Corner Flushers
Short description: TapeTech Corner Flushers make quick work of wiping or finishing inside corners. Direct flushers are used to apply joint compound to internal corners.
Description: TapeTech Corner Flushers make quick work of wiping or finishing inside corners. Direct flushers are used to apply joint compound to internal corners. Indirect flushers simply smooth compound that has been applied by another tool. TapeTech flushers work as both a direct and indirect flusher. That means you don’t have to decide which model to get, only which sizes fit your needs.
